title: Assistant Store Manager - H&M India Global Group - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - H&M India Global Group - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
H&M India Global Group invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Assistant Store Manager at our Dhanbad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About H&M India Global Group:
H&M India Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in POS Systems

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with H&M India Global Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
